title: paronychia capitata subsp. atlantica
intro: Paronychia capitata subsp. atlantica, also known as Atlantic buttonweed or Atlantic buttonwillow, is a type of flowering plant in the Nyctaginaceae family. This plant is native to the southeastern United States and is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its antibacterial and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Paronychia capitata subsp. atlantica include its ability to treat skin conditions such as eczema and acne, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and improve wound healing. Herbal preparations of this plant may be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and it is often used in traditional folk medicine to treat various ailments.
